2026-04-22T22:24:41.4116003Z Found 1 noop item(s)
2026-04-22T22:24:41.4121443Z No-op message 1: No documentation gap detected. Commit 8a2e511 (#58522) by `@m-nash` is a dependency consolidation change that replaces explicit Azure.Identity 1.20.0 package references with Azure.Core 1.53.0 in two ServiceBus sample projects. Azure.Identity types remain available via Azure.Core 1.53+. The sample and SDK README files accurately describe authentication via DefaultAzureCredential and do not need updates.
